title: F0.1 - Add project governance and PR rules
body:
## Objective
Add repository governance documents for Codex and contributors.

## Tasks
- create or complete `/docs` guidance files
- ensure PR checklist and rollback policy are documented
- keep this change runtime-neutral

## Constraints
- no runtime impact
- no refactor
- no business logic changes

## Validation
- documentation files exist in the repository
- repository still builds as before

## Rollback
- revert the added documentation files

title: F1.1 - Introduce AppShell layout
body:
## Objective
Create a top-level `AppShell` layout without changing existing business behavior.

## Tasks
- create `src/app/AppShell.jsx`
- wrap the existing app UI in this layout
- keep current navigation and state behavior intact

## Do not do
- do not change store logic
- do not refactor unrelated components
- do not change data structures

## Validation
- app behavior remains the same
- `npm run build` passes
- UI is visually equivalent except for harmless structural cleanup

## Rollback
- revert AppShell integration

title: F1.2 - Move screens into feature folders
body:
## Objective
Modularize screen files into a feature-oriented structure.

## Tasks
- create `features/projects/screens`
- move `ProjectListScreen`
- move `ProjectScreen`
- fix imports only as needed

## Constraints
- no business logic changes
- no data model changes

## Validation
- project list view works
- project detail view works
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert file moves and import updates

title: F1.3 - Add right panel layout slot
body:
## Objective
Prepare a right-side layout slot for future Markdown preview.

## Tasks
- add a `rightPanel` slot in the layout
- keep layout responsive
- render placeholder or empty slot by default

## Constraints
- no feature behavior changes

## Validation
- desktop layout remains stable
- mobile layout remains usable
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert layout slot changes

title: F2.1 - Add settings slice and defaults
body:
## Objective
Create the settings foundation.

## Fields
- `language`
- `theme`
- `markdownPreviewEnabled`
- `uiDensity`
- `exportFormat`

## Tasks
- add settings defaults
- add settings state management
- hydrate missing default values safely

## Validation
- build passes
- existing project data remains readable

## Rollback
- revert settings slice and defaults

title: F2.2 - Persist settings
body:
## Objective
Persist UI settings reliably across refreshes.

## Tasks
- save settings to local storage layer
- rehydrate on app start
- handle missing values safely

## Validation
- settings persist after refresh
- no project data loss
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert settings persistence

title: F2.3 - Add settings screen
body:
## Objective
Create a minimal settings screen.

## Tasks
- add language control
- add theme control
- add Markdown preview toggle

## Validation
- settings can be changed from the UI
- settings remain persisted
- build passes

## Rollback
- remove settings screen while preserving state if possible

title: F3.1 - Add i18n core
body:
## Objective
Add a lightweight localization core.

## Tasks
- create `src/i18n/fr.json`
- create `src/i18n/en.json`
- create translation helper and hook

## Constraints
- avoid heavy i18n frameworks

## Validation
- translation layer works without full migration
- fallback behavior is defined

## Rollback
- revert i18n core files

title: F3.2 - Migrate global app strings
body:
## Objective
Move global app UI strings to the i18n layer.

## Scope
- app title
- top bar
- global buttons
- global tabs and generic messages

## Validation
- language switch affects migrated strings
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert string migration

title: F3.3 - Migrate project and stage strings
body:
## Objective
Migrate Project and Stage UI strings to the i18n layer.

## Scope
- `ProjectScreen`
- `StageEditor`

## Validation
- labels render correctly in both languages
- no functional regression

## Rollback
- revert string migration

title: F3.4 - Migrate backlog, journal, decisions, and decision tree strings
body:
## Objective
Finish migrating major remaining UI strings.

## Scope
- backlog
- journal
- decisions
- decision tree modal
- PWA prompt

## Validation
- no major hardcoded UI strings remain in these modules
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert string migration

title: F4.1 - Add MarkdownPreview component
body:
## Objective
Create a minimal Markdown preview component.

## Tasks
- add Markdown rendering utility or dependency
- create `MarkdownPreview` component

## Constraints
- keep it simple
- do not introduce a WYSIWYG editor

## Validation
- Markdown renders correctly in isolation
- build passes

## Rollback
- remove component and dependency

title: F4.2 - Add preview toggle from settings
body:
## Objective
Control Markdown preview visibility from settings.

## Tasks
- connect preview visibility to `markdownPreviewEnabled`
- persist the toggle

## Validation
- preview can be shown and hidden
- state persists after refresh

## Rollback
- revert settings binding

title: F4.3 - Render active stage content in preview
body:
## Objective
Render current stage content in the Markdown preview panel.

## Scope
- objective
- notes
- deliverable
- definition of done

## Validation
- preview follows active stage
- editing remains intact
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert preview binding

title: F5.1 - Add attachment model
body:
## Objective
Add a minimal attachments model.

## Supported types
- `url`
- `note`
- `snippet`
- `file_ref`

## Constraints
- keep JSON import/export compatible
- add migration if needed

## Validation
- attachments persist safely
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert model changes with migration rollback if needed

title: F5.2 - Add attachments panel
body:
## Objective
Create a simple UI to manage attachments.

## Tasks
- list attachments
- add attachment
- edit attachment
- delete attachment

## Validation
- CRUD works
- no regression elsewhere
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert attachments panel

title: F5.3 - Integrate attachments into project screen
body:
## Objective
Expose the attachments block in the project screen.

## Validation
- attachments are visible and usable in project context
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert integration changes

title: U1.1 - Add local user profile
body:
## Objective
Create a local `UserProfile` model and state.

## Tasks
- generate a local user on first launch
- persist it safely

## Validation
- a local user is always available
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert local user feature

title: U1.2 - Attach ownerId to projects
body:
## Objective
Associate each project with an `ownerId`.

## Tasks
- migrate existing projects
- ensure new projects receive an ownerId

## Validation
- no project is orphaned
- migration is explicit
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert migration safely

title: U2.1 - Add storage repository layer
body:
## Objective
Introduce a storage abstraction layer.

## Tasks
- add local repository interfaces
- stop direct storage calls from UI where feasible

## Validation
- build passes
- current behavior preserved

## Rollback
- revert repository layer

title: U2.2 - Migrate projects to IndexedDB
body:
## Objective
Move project storage to IndexedDB through the abstraction layer.

## Constraints
- no silent data loss
- explicit migration required

## Validation
- existing projects migrate correctly
- create/update/read still work
- build passes

## Rollback
- restore previous adapter

title: U2.3 - Migrate settings and user storage consistently
body:
## Objective
Align user and settings persistence with the new storage strategy.

## Validation
- user and settings persist correctly
- migration is safe
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert persistence changes

title: U3.1 - Add sync metadata to ProjectDocument
body:
## Objective
Add sync metadata fields to the project document.

## Fields
- `localVersion`
- `remoteVersion`
- `lastSyncedAt`
- `dirty`

## Constraints
- preserve import/export compatibility
- add explicit migration

## Validation
- metadata is added safely
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert metadata changes safely

title: U5.1 - Add sync engine skeleton
body:
## Objective
Create the minimal sync engine structure.

## Tasks
- add `pushProject`
- add `pullProject`
- add `syncProject`
- add conflict computation stub

## Constraints
- no real backend required yet

## Validation
- sync engine is present and non-invasive
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert sync engine skeleton

title: U5.2 - Implement conflict detection
body:
## Objective
Implement a simple explicit conflict detection strategy.

## Strategy
- controlled last-write-wins
- no silent overwrite when both sides changed

## Validation
- conflict states can be detected
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert conflict logic

title: U5.3 - Add sync status UI
body:
## Objective
Expose sync state in the UI.

## States
- local only
- dirty
- synced
- conflict
- error

## Validation
- sync status is visible and coherent
- build passes

## Rollback
- revert sync status UI
